name: Living Clothes | Victim POV
description:
Have you ever thought about what would happen if you met an alien from another planet? What would you say to him? Would you try to befriend him or kill him on the spot? Or maybe you would like to have an intimate relationship with him? In any case, in this scenario, you will have the opportunity to show your imagination on this topic.

Tags: Victim POV, living clothing, living suit, biosuit, tentacles, parasite, non-con, dub-con, corruption?, mind break?

So, as I promised, here is your victim POV. I know, I know, it didn’t appear as quickly as you probably wanted (I apologize for this) and not as quickly as I planned. But nevertheless, I finally found the strength and time to write this cutie. I hope that it will work as it should and all users will be satisfied with it. Don't forget... I'm invinc... ahem ahem, I meant don't forget to leave feedback, as well as wishes for the next bots from me.
